name: comfyui-agent-kit
description: Local-first ComfyUI skills + the comfyui-mcp connection for Claude Code. The plugin form of ComfyUI-Agent-Kit, the local-first counterpart to the Comfy Cloud MCP.

plugins.name: comfyui
plugins.description: Drive a LOCAL ComfyUI (your GPU, no cloud, no account) end to end: 67 model prompt recipes, hardware-aware model selection, workflow building, multi-shot video, the comfyui-mcp driver. The local-first counterpart to the Comfy Cloud MCP.
